ownershipBoundary: Relay downloads and verifies external OpenWork/OpenCode artifacts only. OpenWork/OpenCode own UX, sessions, permissions, tools, MCP, and execution.

openworkDesktop.name: OpenWork Desktop
openworkDesktop.license: MIT outside /ee; release artifact contents require explicit review before production auto-install.

compatibilityNotes: OpenWork dev currently pins opencodeVersion to v1.4.9; this manifest intentionally pins a checked OpenCode CLI asset and requires compatibility smoke before downloader release.
Relay must not execute tools, own transcripts, or restore bundled runtime sidecars when using these artifacts.
